item.title: Doctor diagnostics + auto-fix
item.intent: Make 'clawhq doctor' the single command that catches every known failure mode before it hits the user. Auto-fix must resolve common issues without requiring knowledge of internals.
item.description: HERO FEATURE: 'doctor' is the safety net that turns OpenClaw from 'it silently broke' to 'I know exactly what's wrong and how to fix it'. The 14+ checks cover every known failure mode preventively. Auto-fix means the user doesn't need to know what cap_drop is — they just run 'clawhq doctor --fix' and it works. Table output is the key UX: all checks visible at a glance, pass/fail clear, fix suggestions actionable. Acceptance: all 14+ checks run; auto-fix resolves common issues; table alignment clean; JSON output available for scripting.
steps: Implement 14+ preventive diagnostic checks covering all known failure modes
Add auto-fix capability for common issues
Build table output with pass/fail status per check
Add JSON output mode for scripting
acceptanceCriteria: All 14+ diagnostic checks run and report status
Auto-fix resolves common issues (e.g., cap_drop, permissions)
Table output aligned and readable at a glance
JSON output available for scripting and automation
